issues.description: Git clone URL in Quickstart section (line ~63) uses 'CliCursorProxyAPI' as repo name, but the actual repository is 'opencode-cursor' (https://github.com/ThewindMom/opencode-cursor.git). Users who copy-paste the clone command will get a 404 error. The cd command on line 64 also uses 'CliCursorProxyAPI'.
License badge shows 'BSD-3-Clause' but package.json license field is 'ISC'. This is a factual inconsistency about the project's license.

Project structure section (line ~380) is incomplete. The proxy/ directory listing only shows handler.ts, server.ts, standalone-server.ts but is missing: formatter.ts, prompt-builder.ts, tool-loop.ts, types.ts. The streaming/ directory listing shows only parser.ts, line-buffer.ts, delta-tracker.ts but is missing: ai-sdk-parts.ts, openai-sse.ts, types.ts.

Quickstart includes 'bun run build' step after 'bun install', but 'bun run proxy' works directly from source without building. The build step is only needed if installing the CLI globally, not for running the proxy.
Prerequisites section mentions cursor-agent install via 'curl https://cursor.com/install -fsS | bash' as a description rather than a formatted code block, making it less clear for copy-paste usage.

sharedStateObservations.description: The project has no entry in .factory/library/ documenting the project naming discrepancy (CliCursorProxyAPI vs opencode-cursor). This caused the README to reference incorrect clone URL. A library entry clarifying the project history/naming would prevent future documentation errors.
The README correctly documents the cursor-proxy service from .factory/services.yaml in the Factory Droid integration section. This is accurate.

summary: The README has significant blocking issues: (1) The git clone URL uses a non-existent repository name 'CliCursorProxyAPI' instead of the actual 'opencode-cursor', which will cause users to get 404 errors, (2) The license badge claims BSD-3-Clause but the actual license is ISC. Non-blocking issues include incomplete project structure listing and minor quickstart inaccuracies. All required sections exist (quickstart, architecture overview, client integration guides, troubleshooting), but accuracy problems need fixing.
